generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually taking advantage of our defense commitments? While we're spending billions to protect them, they're cutting their own defense budgets. It's time to rethink our alliance commitments and focus on securing our own borders first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
